name: JD Vance
summary: JD Vance has consistently demonstrated a pattern of behavior that is divisive, inflammatory, and often based on false or misleading information. He has made derogatory comments about various groups, including childless individuals, immigrants, and members of the LGBTQ+ community, and has promoted policies that would harm or marginalize these groups. Vance has also shown a willingness to spread false or unsubstantiated claims, such as his allegations about Haitian migrants eating pets, and has defended these claims even when faced with evidence to the contrary. Additionally, Vance has expressed support for authoritarian and anti-democratic ideas, including the notion that the executive branch should have unchecked power and that judges should not be able to review its actions. Overall, Vance's character and behavior are marked by a disregard for facts, a lack of empathy, and a commitment to promoting divisive and harmful ideologies.

entries.fact: JD Vance complained about 'highly educated transplants' in Silicon Valley in a New York Times op-ed.
JD Vance said elite tech crowds wielded 'political-financial power in combination with a certain condescension'.
Our Ohio Renewal, a nonprofit founded by JD Vance, spent more on 'management services' than on programs to fight opioid abuse in its first year.
Our Ohio Renewal's biggest accomplishment, sending psychiatrist Sally Satel to Ohio's Appalachian region, was 'tainted' by ties between Satel, her employer, and Purdue Pharma.
JD Vance's nonprofit, Our Ohio Renewal, was criticized by Tim Ryan for being a front for Vance's political ambitions and failing to address addiction.
JD Vance voted against raising the debt ceiling, standing against final passage of the Fiscal Responsibility Act of 2023
JD Vance and Representative Marjorie Taylor Greene introduced legislation that would have made gender-affirming care for minors a federal crime, with penalties of up to 12 years in prison
JD Vance sponsored the Dismantle DEI Act, which would ban federal diversity, equity, and inclusion programs and funding for agencies, contractors, and organizations receiving federal funds
JD Vance said that Kamala Harris 'can go to hell' because 'she wants to yell at Donald Trump because he showed up' at Arlington National Cemetery
JD Vance said 'Don't do this fake outrage thing' in response to criticism of Trump's visit to Arlington National Cemetery
JD Vance said that a vice president 'doesn't really matter' and that Kamala Harris 'has been a bad vice president'
JD Vance stated that Trump had 'said that explicitly that he would' veto a national abortion ban

JD Vance said in a Fox News interview that the country is run by 'a bunch of childless cat ladies who are miserable at their own lives and the choices that they've made and so they want to make the rest of the country miserable too'
JD Vance said in a podcast interview that being childless 'makes people more sociopathic and ultimately our whole country a little bit less, less mentally stable'
JD Vance suggested in an interview on The Charlie Kirk Show that childless people should be taxed at a higher rate than those with children

JD Vance alleged that Haitian illegal immigrants were 'draining social services and generally causing chaos all over Springfield, Ohio' and that 'reports now show that people have had their pets abducted and eaten by people who shouldn't be in this country'
JD Vance said that a child was murdered by a Haitian migrant who had no right to be in the country, despite the child's death being an accidental collision between vehicles
JD Vance spoke at a western Pennsylvania town hall event organized by Lance Wallnau, who has promoted election denialism and called Kamala Harris a 'demon'
JD Vance said he did not believe Trump lost the 2020 presidential election and that he believed 'Big Tech rigged the election' through censorship

JD Vance defended his claims about Haitian migrants eating cats, saying that he was willing 'to create stories so that the American media actually pays attention ... we're creating a story, meaning we're creating the American media focusing on it'

JD Vance objected to fact-checking during the vice presidential debate, arguing that the immigrants in Springfield, Ohio should not be considered legal because the federal government decided their protected status after they had arrived in the United States
JD Vance wrote that 'judges aren't allowed to control the executive's legitimate power' after multiple federal judges issued temporary rulings against various Trump administration actions

JD Vance lamented that the 'globalist economy' had caused the United States to 'borrow money from Chinese peasants to buy the things those Chinese peasants manufacture', and China slammed his 'peasants' remarks
JD Vance told Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy that the path to peace and prosperity is maybe engaging in diplomacy, and that America engaging in diplomacy is what makes it a good country.

JD Vance replied to Zelenskyy's concerns about Russian President Vladimir Putin not abiding by a ceasefire and prisoner exchange agreement, saying that he was discussing diplomacy that's going to end the destruction of Ukraine.

JD Vance accused Zelenskyy of showing a propaganda tour of Ukraine and asked whether Zelenskyy had ever offered thanks to President Trump, despite Zelenskyy starting the conversation by saying 'Thank you so much' to Trump.

JD Vance incorrectly claimed that Zelenskyy went to Pennsylvania and campaigned for the opposition in October 2024, when in fact Zelenskyy had visited a factory to thank workers producing ammunition for Ukraine.
JD Vance advised Trump to fire all civil servants and replace them with Trump supporters.
JD Vance said that if he had been vice president during the 2020 presidential election, he would not have certified the results.
JD Vance proposed federal criminalization of gender-affirming care for minors.
JD Vance said there is a 'need to seize the institutions of the left' and has called for 'a de-woke-ification program' even if the courts say it is illegal.
JD Vance made a comment referring to 'childless cat ladies', sparking widespread criticism
JD Vance defended his 'childless cat ladies' comment, calling it 'sarcastic'
JD Vance stated that 'childless people' in US leadership are 'more sociopathic'
JD Vance backtracked from his suggestion that parents should have more voting power than non-parents.
JD Vance bashed a teachers union president for not having 'some of her own' children in resurfaced remarks.
JD Vance told Kamala Harris to 'go to hell' for criticism she did not give
JD Vance pushed false accusations of Haitians eating pets.
JD Vance said his false claim about Haitian migrants may not be true but urged followers to keep posting 'cat memes'.
JD Vance shared a social media post about immigrants cooking pets in Dayton, which the city refuted.
JD Vance sticks by pet-eating claims and says he's willing to 'create stories'.
JD Vance appeared at an event hosted by a hard-right Christian nationalist
